title: helichrysum citricephalum
intro: Helichrysum citricephalum, also known as Lemon-Ginger Helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to possess antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum citricephalum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Helichrysum citricephalum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
